reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the adventure game designed by Ken St. Andre.
2. Using that game, determine the name of its 1979 role-playing game adventure.
original_final_question: What is the name for the adventure in "Tunnels and Trolls", a game designed by Ken St. Andre? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which fantasy role-playing game designed by Ken St. Andre is abbreviated T&T? Evidence: Tunnels & Trolls: Tunnels & Trolls (abbreviated "T&T") is a fantasy role-playing game designed by Ken St. Andre and first published in 1975 by Flying Buffalo. -> Tunnels & Trolls

Node 2: What 1979 adventure was published for Tunnels & Trolls? Evidence: Arena of Khazan: Arena of Khazan is a 1979 role-playing game adventure for "Tunnels & Trolls" published by Flying Buffalo. -> Arena of Khazan
